name: Puma Exploration Inc.
summary: Puma Exploration Inc., a junior mining exploration company, acquires, explores for, and develops mining properties in Canada. The company explores for gold and copper deposits. It owns interests in the Williams Brook, Nicholas-Denys, Red Brook, Turgeon, Murray Brook, Murray Brook Minerals, Chester, Portage Lake, Fe Bloom, and Jonpol projects located in New Brunswick. Puma Exploration Inc. is headquartered in Rimouski, Canada.
